appearance.breed: 賓士貓（黑白雙色短毛貓）
appearance.body: 精實靈活，動作敏捷，隨時一副蓄勢待發的樣子
appearance.face: 黑色的頭頂與耳朵，白色的下巴和口鼻，像戴著小面具的紳士
appearance.fur_pattern: 亮黑色為主的短毛，胸前有一大片白色圍兜，四腳穿白襪，下巴到肚子是白色
distinctive_features: 胸前的白色圍兜，像穿著小燕尾服
四隻腳都穿著白色小襪子
白色下巴配黑色小鼻頭
黑色大耳朵，內側是粉色
尾巴全黑，興奮時會豎得直直的

quirks: 看到紙箱一定要跳進去
喜歡把桌上的小東西撥到地上再看你撿
personality.voice: 清亮活潑，話很多，喵個不停

visual_prompt_snippet: [IDENTITY CARD] Oreo — an agile tuxedo cat with glossy jet-black #101010 shorthair and crisp white #FFFFFF markings: a large white chest bib like a tiny tuxedo shirt, white chin and muzzle, white belly, and four white socks. Head-top and ears black (pink inner ears), giving a dapper masked-gentleman look. Tail: fully black, often held high. Eyes: round, bright yellow-green #B7C94A. Small black nose. Lean, athletic, springy posture — always ready to pounce. Expression: mischievous, alert, playful. [HARD CONSTRAINTS] 1) Black-and-white tuxedo pattern ONLY — white ONLY on bib/chin/muzzle/belly/socks. 2) Tail fully black — NEVER white-tipped. 3) Yellow-green #B7C94A eyes ONLY — NEVER blue. 4) Shorthair glossy coat, NEVER long or fluffy. 5) Lean agile build — NEVER chubby. 6) No bow tie, collar, or accessories — the tuxedo is fur only. End.
negative_prompt: grey fur, tabby stripes, orange patches, calico, all-black cat, all-white cat, white tail tip, blue eyes, amber eyes, longhair, fluffy coat, chubby cat, fat cat, bow tie, collar, necklace, bandana, clothing, anthropomorphic cat, cat with human body, cat with human hands, cat standing upright like a person, humanoid cat, furry character, catboy, mascot costume, cat wearing full human clothing, cat with human face
story_context: 奧利奧是巷子裡最有名的搗蛋鬼，穿著一身永遠不會皺的小燕尾服，卻專門做不紳士的事：推倒花盆、偷襲落葉、把別人的毛線球帶回家。但沒有人真的生牠的氣——因為牠闖完禍以後，會歪著頭看你，那雙黃綠色的眼睛裡寫滿「我很可愛所以沒事吧」。

seasonal_variants.spring: 在公園追著飄落的花瓣跳來跳去
seasonal_variants.summer: 躲在騎樓陰影裡，伺機偷襲路過的拖鞋
seasonal_variants.autumn: 在落葉堆裡打滾，燕尾服沾滿葉子也不在乎
seasonal_variants.winter: 鑽進剛拆的紙箱裡，只露出兩隻黑耳朵
